metadata.focus: narrator describing rooms or bedrooms behind western storefronts

data.text: Miles. Yeah. This most unique member of the Dude Ranchers Association is laid out to look just like a town out of the Old West. But behind the doors of what appears to be the mining office, Miss Kitty's bordello, or Doc Holliday's dentist chair, are state-of-the-art rooms, decorated in an 1880s flair. We live in the newspaper. Juergen von Wolf and his wife Karen were here from Germany on a springtime visit to the ranch, their seventh in just five years, with plans for two more trips by the end of the year. it's the people it's the scenery it's surroundings it's the horses it's the personnel a lot of people ask
